name: input-with-text
visual_summary: The input-with-text component is a basic form control consisting of a text box and an optional label. It is commonly used for general text input, such as usernames, passwords, or search queries. This component is typically used when a user needs to enter a piece of information.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: input-with-text
Description: The input-with-text component is a basic form control consisting of a text box and an optional label. It is commonly used for general text input, such as usernames, passwords, or search queries. This component is typically used when a user needs to enter a piece of information.
Style: default, compact
Interactions: focus, hover
Tags: form, input, text

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
